user.title: Electricity Price Suite
user.description: Choose what kind of suite entry you want to create.

timeline.title: Create Price Timeline
timeline.description: Create one price timeline entry and configure its base behavior.

profile_logger.title: Create Consumption Profile Logger
profile_logger.description: Create one logger entry that learns profiles from a total-increasing energy sensor.

primary_type.title: Configure Primary Source
primary_type.description:
Choose how the primary price source is read.

**entity_action**
Call a service and parse its response.
Example: official Home Assistant Tibber integration via `tibber.get_prices`.

**entity_attribute**
Read slots from an entity attribute.
Example: EPEX Spot integrations exposing a slot list in an attribute.

**inject_only**
No automatic fetching. Data is pushed via `electricity_price_suite.inject_slots`.
Each slot object must include at least `start_time` and `price_per_kwh`.

Secondary/fallback sources can be added later via `manage_sources`.

primary_inject.title: Primary Source (Inject Only)
primary_inject.description: Use this if you push prices manually via electricity_price_suite.inject_slots. Required slot object keys are start_time and price_per_kwh.

primary_attribute.title: Primary Source (Entity Attribute)
primary_attribute.description: Use this when price slots are stored in an entity attribute (for example attribute data with slot list).

primary_action.title: Primary Source (Entity Action)
primary_action.description: Use this when prices come from a service response (for example tibber.get_prices). Response path points to the slot list in the returned data.

error.invalid_json: Request payload must be valid JSON object.
error.unsupported_energy_unit: Entity must use Wh or kWh.

refresh_timeline.name: Refresh timeline
refresh_timeline.description: Refresh today and tomorrow slots from configured sources and merge them by priority.

sources.name: Sources override
sources.description: Optional temporary source list for this call.

overwrite.name: Overwrite stored today/tomorrow rows
overwrite.description: If true, delete existing rows for today and tomorrow before fetching again.

inject_slots.name: Inject slots
inject_slots.description: Inject slot data directly into the timeline store.

slots.name: Slots
slots.description: List of slot objects with at least start_time and price_per_kwh.

source_name.name: Source name
source_name.description: Source id stored with injected rows.

source_priority.name: Source priority
source_priority.description: Priority rank for injected rows (lower rank replaces higher rank).

is_primary.name: Treat as primary source
is_primary.description: Mark injected rows as primary-source rows.

overwrite.name: Overwrite rows for matching dates
overwrite.description: If true, delete stored rows for the same local dates before injecting new rows.

optimize_device.name: Optimize device
optimize_device.description: Compute the best start time for a device.

device_name.name: Device name
device_name.description: Logical device label used to build and persist the plan entity.

duration_minutes.name: Duration (minutes)
duration_minutes.description: Runtime duration in minutes. Provide this or a usable energy profile source.

profile_slot_minutes.name: Profile slot minutes
profile_slot_minutes.description: Minutes per profile segment in energy_profile.

billing_slot_minutes.name: Billing slot minutes
billing_slot_minutes.description: Override billing slot length. If omitted, it is detected from timeline data.

profile_logger_entity.name: Profile logger entity
profile_logger_entity.description: Meta sensor of an Electricity Price Suite profile logger. Used for direct internal profile loading.

program_key.name: Program key
program_key.description: Program key to load from the selected profile logger, for example auto_2.

program_display_name.name: Program display name
program_display_name.description: Optional compact display label persisted with the plan, for example Auto 2 [I,D,S]. This does not change the technical program key.

align_start_to_billing_slot.name: Align start to billing slot
align_start_to_billing_slot.description: If true, candidate starts are restricted to billing slot boundaries.

max_extra_cost_percent.name: Max extra cost percent
max_extra_cost_percent.description: Maximum extra cost in percent that is still acceptable when prefer_earliest is enabled.

prefer_earliest.name: Prefer earliest
prefer_earliest.description: Pick the earliest candidate within the allowed extra-cost threshold instead of the strict absolute minimum.

start_mode.name: Start mode
start_mode.description: Start anchor mode: now or now plus start_in_minutes.

start_in_minutes.name: Start in minutes
start_in_minutes.description: Offset used when start_mode is in.

deadline_minutes.name: Deadline minutes
deadline_minutes.description: Relative deadline value for selected deadline_mode.

latest_start.name: Latest start (ISO)
latest_start.description: Expert override for absolute latest allowed start datetime (ISO). Internally normalized to the optimizer latest-start boundary.

latest_finish.name: Latest finish (ISO)
latest_finish.description: Expert override for absolute latest allowed finish datetime (ISO). Internally converted to a derived latest start.

manage_plan.name: Manage plan
manage_plan.description: Reset, delete, or re-optimize existing plan entities.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Management mode. Use reset, delete, or reoptimize.

manage_profile.name: Manage profile
manage_profile.description: Get, reset, or delete profiles, and manage estimated runtimes for one logger.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Management mode. Use get, reset, delete, add_estimated_runtimes, list_estimated_runtimes, delete_estimated_runtime, or clear_estimated_runtimes.

program_key.name: Program key
program_key.description: Program key used for one profile operation. Only used for mode=get, reset, delete, delete_estimated_runtime.

desired_slot_minutes.name: Desired slot minutes
desired_slot_minutes.description: Optional resampled slot size. Only used for mode=get.

debug.name: Debug payload
debug.description: Include extra runtime/debug details. Only used for mode=get.

items.name: Items
items.description: Mapping of program_key to duration_minutes. Only used for mode=add_estimated_runtimes.

manage_sources.name: Manage sources
manage_sources.description: Add, list, or delete pull sources in the timeline source chain.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Management mode. Use add, list, or delete.

id.name: Source ID
id.description: Unique source identifier inside the selected timeline. Only used for mode=add, list, delete.

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: Source priority (lower number wins in conflicts). Only used for mode=add.

source_type.name: Source type
source_type.description: Pull source mode. Use entity_attribute for attributes or entity_action for service responses. Only used for mode=add.

source_entity_id.name: Source entity
source_entity_id.description: Entity used by the source (required for entity_attribute, optional for entity_action). Only used for mode=add.

attribute.name: Attribute
attribute.description: Attribute name that contains slot rows. Only used for mode=add.

action.name: Action
action.description: Service action to call in domain.service format. Only used for mode=add.

response_path.name: Response path
response_path.description: Dotted path to slot list in the action response. Only used for mode=add.

request_payload.name: Request payload
request_payload.description: Additional payload forwarded to the action call. Only used for mode=add.

time_key.name: Time key
time_key.description: Key name used for slot start datetime in each row. Only used for mode=add.

price_key.name: Price key
price_key.description: Key name used for price value in each row. Only used for mode=add.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the source is enabled. Only used for mode=add.

inject_time_window.name: Inject time window
inject_time_window.description: Auto-inject start/end values for today and tomorrow into action payload. Only used for mode=add.

start_key.name: Start key
start_key.description: Payload key to write injected start datetime into. Only used for mode=add.

end_key.name: End key
end_key.description: Payload key to write injected end datetime into. Only used for mode=add.

time_format.name: Datetime format
time_format.description: Datetime format for injected start/end values. Only used for mode=add.

manage_profile_run.name: Manage profile run
manage_profile_run.description: Start, finish, or abort an active logger run.

mode.name: Mode
mode.description: Management mode. Use start, finish, or abort.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Abort reason stored with the logger runtime. Only used for mode=abort.

program_key.name: Program key
program_key.description: Program key for the selected run operation. Only used for mode=start, finish, abort.
